summary: Enhancement 9 (AI Deal Finder) tested end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests PASSED in 38.5s including real Claude calls for /find and /searches/{id}/refresh, persistence of last_results/last_summary/last_run_at, CRUD, autoseed of 65-inch TV, and 400/404 error paths. Frontend: /shopping hub-deal-finder tile routes to /shopping/deal-finder; form renders all testIDs (df-product, df-max-price, df-target-price, df-notes, df-find, df-save), 4 urgency pills, 3 quality pills, 15 retailer pills. df-save → search appears in SAVED SEARCHES; saved-delete-{id} removes the row (window.confirm auto-accepted on web). AI-dependent UI flows (df-find, saved-run-{id}) returned 500 from backend due to EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exceeded ($2.015/$2.00) — environmental only; the same endpoints succeed via pytest minutes earlier, confirming code is correct. No deprecated Expo packages or RN issues found in this module.

integration_issues.issue: Returned 500 because EMERGENT_LLM_KEY hit max budget ($2.015 > $2.00 cap). Not a code bug — backend pytest for /find and /refresh PASSED minutes earlier in same run. Increase/reset LLM key budget to re-verify UI happy path.

action_items: Top up / reset EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget so UI Find/Refresh flows can be re-validated end-to-end. Code path itself is verified by pytest.
critical_code_review_comments: deal_finder.py is clean: pops _id and user_id before returning, validates product length, uses async Mongo operations, raises proper 400/404, and seeds only when empty (idempotent).

Frontend deal-finder.tsx properly uses SafeAreaView from react-native-safe-area-context, StyleSheet.create, Text wrapping, testIDs on every interactive element, and platform branch for web confirm vs Alert.

success_rate.frontend: form + tile + save + delete verified; AI-dependent flows blocked by LLM budget

seed_data_creation: None created beyond what the API autoseeds (the 65-inch 4K OLED TV search for new users). Created+deleted Nintendo Switch OLED search and Sony WH-1000XM6 saved search during testing — all cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Enhancement 9 backend endpoints work as specified. UI parity test for df-find / saved-run was blocked by LLM budget; once budget is restored, simply re-run the playwright flow that fills the form, clicks df-find, then df-save, then saved-run-{id}.
rca_of_issue: df-find UI returned 500 → backend log shows litellm.BadRequestError: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 2.015352, Max budget: 2.0' raised inside emergentintegrations.llm.chat.send_message. The deal_finder /find handler does not catch this, so FastAPI returns 500. Mitigation (out of scope for code): top up budget. Optional defensive fix: catch ChatError in /find and /refresh and return a 503 with a user-friendly message rather than 500.
